top_signals.title: Magnificent 7 Lose $767 Billion as AI Skeptics Dump Tech Stocks
top_signals.summary: The Magnificent Seven group of megacap technology stocks is on track for its biggest one-day drop since the tariff tantrum in April 2025 as results from Alphabet Inc. and Tesla Inc. are casting doubt on the durability of the artificial intelligence trade that has powered the stock market for more than three years.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Tassat wants to help smaller banks tap the trillion-dollar stablecoin boom before Wall Street lock them out
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.
